channel.title: MiSTer FPGA Core & Arcade Tracker: Updates
channel.description: Shipped updates to existing cores and arcade games in the public MiSTer databases. See feed.xml for new releases too.

item.title: [Updated] Eyes (Arcade)
item.description:
Maze / 1982 / Techstar

Core: pacman

Updated in the public MiSTer databases on 2026-07-20 (source: distribution_mister).

Commit history
